entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used for food and fodder

entities.name: ICTP 8203
entities.description: An open-pollinated variety of pearl millet released in 1988

entities.name: WC-C75
entities.description: A leading commercial open-pollinated cultivar of pearl millet

entities.name: INIARI LANDRACE
entities.description: An early-maturing landrace of pearl millet originating from northern Togo

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where ICTP 8203 was released and tested

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where ICTP 8203 was released and tested

entities.name: TOGO
entities.description: Country of origin for the Iniari landrace

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A trial location for ICTP 8203

entities.name: HISAR
entities.description: A trial location for ICTP 8203

entities.name: BHAVANISEGAR
entities.description: A trial location for ICTP 8203

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where multi-location trials were conducted

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach full development

entities.name: EAR TYPE
entities.description: The physical characteristics and shape of the grain-bearing ear

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The timing of the flowering stage in the plant's life cycle

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The process and rate at which grains accumulate dry matter

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the flowering and seed-bearing head

entities.name: GRAIN COLOR
entities.description: The visual color of the harvested grains

entities.name: GRAIN DENSITY
entities.description: The compactness or weight per unit volume of the grains

entities.name: 1000-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: The combined weight of one thousand grains

entities.name: RANDOM MATING
entities.description: A breeding method involving the random pairing of individuals

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSSES
entities.description: A breeding design where all possible combinations of parents are crossed

entities.name: SIB-MULTIPLICATION
entities.description: A method of increasing seed quantity through sibling crosses

entities.name: BULKING
entities.description: A method of combining seeds from multiple crosses to create a population

entities.name: CONTROLLED CROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method where specific parents are chosen for mating

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year with minimal rainfall

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year with maximum rainfall

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet
